title: Predetermine Country Code on Phone Columns
excerpt: Trying to figure out how to have predetermine country code on a phone column. Does anyone here have any idea how is it done? Do Monday has the native setting for it? or need to be with 3rd integration?

posts.author: ofuks001 (Omara Fuks)
posts.cookedHtml: Trying to figure out how to have predetermine country code on a phone column. Does anyone here have any idea how is it done? Do Monday has the native setting for it? or need to be with 3rd integration?

posts.author: Vahid (Vahid Davani)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi dear @ofuks001 , there is no defaults setting for predetermine country code on a phone column, regarding 3rd party integration, that’s depends on how do you input data in a monday board, make is one of good 3rd parties to try

Let me know if you have any other question
Thanks
